content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.24%, Bank Nifty -1.57%, VIX +12% to 18.90 — risk-off tape with PSU Bank and Realty leading down. However, IT and Pharma showing relative strength (rupee weakness tailwind), and select FMCG/financial names bucking the trend on earnings. With 15 CNC positions already on the book and 65% deployed, priority is position management — trail SLs on winners, exit broken theses. New entries require very high bar today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% winner, but stored SL 1075.00 is ABOVE CMP 1084.70 by only 0.9% — wait, verify: SL 1075 vs CMP 1084.70, SL is BELOW CMP by 0.9%. That's TOO TIGHT (Rule 15c: trail SL must sit ≥1.0% below CMP). Loosen trail to 1055 (2.7% below CMP) to preserve recovery option while still locking +7.2% gain over entry 984. Q4 PAT +19% beat, AAA rating pursuit catalyst intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, SL 121 still 2.2% below CMP 123.69. Gold thesis (Fed path, central bank buying, INR weakness) intact. SL doing its job — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: stored SL is 825, no change needed. EXIT to HOLD instead — SL 825 is 1.0% below CMP 833.30, exactly at the trail-gap floor. Q4 beat, FMCG strength today (HUL +4.7%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1356.71 is 1.7% below CMP 1380 — already at proper trail gap. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD. +9.2% winner, Encora/Cigniti catalysts intact, brokerage targets 1667-2020. Let it run toward 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, SL 3000 is 0.1% above CMP 2997 — SL essentially being tested. Rule 17 discipline: do NOT preempt SL. Thesis (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1) intact. If SL trips intraday, accept it; do not exit at -2.6% on tape wobble. HAL results May 13 is a cluster-read catalyst, not a binary on GRSE."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, SL 820 is 0.9% below CMP 827.45 — slightly tight but stored level acceptable. Q4 record revenue/PAT, three investor meets May 15-27 ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, SL 1465 is 1.3% above CMP 1445.90 — SL ABOVE CMP means already in stopout zone. Rule 17: do NOT panic-close. Q4 PAT +36.6%, dividend Rs 11.50, pricing power intact. Let SL fire if it must — thesis is sound."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL 1580 is 2.8% below CMP 1624.90. Turnaround Q4 (loss → Rs 164 cr PAT), Zaynich USFDA approval mid-2026 long-dated catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL 2755 is 0.9% below CMP 2779.10 — at trail floor. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, fluorochemicals upcycle. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, SL 9020 is 0.8% below CMP 9091. Q4 record revenue, brokerage targets 9700-10500. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, SL 1955 is 1.7% below CMP 1989. Research turned BEARISH (Q4 PAT -17.4%, UBS/Citi SELL, consensus target 1751 vs CMP 1989 implies -14%). Concerning, but SL is properly placed and not yet violated — let SL do its job rather than premature exit (Rule 17). If SL trips, accept it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.2%, SL 354 is 0.8% below CMP 356.80 — SL being tested. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Rule 17: do NOT pre-empt SL. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, SL 10440 is 1.5% below CMP 10598. Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000 provides floor support. Hold — strong setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9%, SL 472 is 2.0% below CMP 481.65. Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit, FMCG bid today. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1226 equals entry (breakeven). +1.6% gain, CMP 1246.60, SL 1.7% below CMP. No-op — current SL placement is optimal (breakeven + 1.6% buffer). Treating as HOLD. Pharma momentum, near 52w high, CDMO catalysts intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Stored SL 1075 is too tight (0.9% below CMP) — loosen to 1055 (2.7% gap) per Rule 15c trail-gap discipline; preserves +7.2% locked gain."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121 at 2.2% below CMP — proper buffer; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at trail floor; Q4 beat + FMCG strength supports hold."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1356.71 at 1.7% gap below CMP — proper; let winner run to 1420."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Rule 17: do NOT preempt SL. Defence shipbuilder thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Investor conferences ahead; SL gap acceptable."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL above CMP — Rule 17 forbids premature close; thesis sound."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround intact, Zaynich catalyst pending."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fluorochemicals upcycle, Q4 strong."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Brokerage targets well above CMP; near 52w high."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bearish research turn noted but SL not yet violated. Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL being tested but Q4 PAT +30.6% thesis intact. Let SL work."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at Rs 12,000 supports CMP. Hold."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat, FY27 guidance upgrade, FMCG strength."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL with 1.7% gap to CMP — optimal placement; pharma momentum intact."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Qualifying BULLISH candidates surveyed for new admits (Rule 18 explicit walk-through): NUVAMA — REJECTED (Rule 11 binary event: board meeting/Q4 results TODAY May 11 + earnings call May 12; +10% gap already prices in beat; SEBI/NSE warning letters to subsidiary NWIL are governance flags per Rule 13). THERMAX — already +14.6% gap, chase-risk, not analyzed in depth. PERSISTENT — IT sector relative strength noted but no fresh BUY needed (COFORGE already gives IT exposure). LALPATHLAB/TATACONSUM/BERGEPAINT — BERGEPAINT has earnings May 12 (Rule 11 reject); LALPATHLAB and TATACONSUM gapped large, chase-risk. CGPOWER/NBCC — Capital Goods cluster already has POLYCAB+GRSE+BHARATFORG+SRF — Rule 10 cluster cap reached, no more admits. INFY/HCLTECH/SUNPHARMA — defensive but already have COFORGE (IT), WOCKPHARMA+LAURUSLABS (pharma); no incremental edge. NIFTYBEES/PSUBNKBEES — VIX +12%, market in risk-off; not a bounce-bet day. Net: zero new admits is the right call today because (a) 15 positions already on book with sector exposure across IT/FMCG/Pharma/Financial/Capital Goods/Auto, (b) VIX spike to 18.90 with PSU Bank -2.16% signals genuine risk-off (not anchored conservatism — explicit macro shift), (c) the best qualifying candidate (NUVAMA) has a same-day binary, (d) remaining deployable ₹151K is the 20% buffer floor zone — reserve preserved appropriately.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 15 names, +0.57% today on unrealized. Today's discipline: trail-SL on PNBHOUSING (only true winner needing adjustment), HOLD on all SLs being tested (Rule 17 — do not preempt). HFCL pending BUY from earlier session (7502 min ago = stale) should be reviewed — but it's a MIS order and at ₹133.50 limit; since I don't have HFCL current price data here, leaving as-is. Performance context (12% win rate, profit factor 0.5x over 5 days) argues for tighter management, not more admits. Capital preservation > new entries today given VIX spike."
}
